productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Pink Retro Top
description: Composition Pink round neck top, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this pretty top from doodle.
